snippet.title: Amanda Blanc: Finding Your Voice And Speaking Up
snippet.description:
This episode is the start of our CEO Series, in which we will be deep diving into what it takes to be a CEO.

Amanda Blanc is a Welsh businesswoman and the current CEO of Aviva, stepping into the role in July 2020. Amanda grew up in Rhondda valley in Wales, both her grandparents were miners. In this episode she shares how her childhood in Rhondda instilled in her the importance of community, freedom, happiness and fun.

Amanda discusses what she has learnt from her role as CEO and how she approaches leading a million pound company. Communication is key for Amanda, she approaches every conversation with an open mind, wanting to learn how she can improve her work and in turn, the company. During Covid, Amanda would hold virtual town-halls in which she would invite colleagues to share their thoughts with her directly. A key learning for Amanda is, “be your own customer”. You need to use your own service, see how it functions as a user - the good and the bad parts.

In this episode Jake, Damian and Amanda also discuss emotional intelligence, why she will always choose the hard option and how she dealt with being told she was not “the man for the job”.

Thank you to PwC for sponsoring this special CEO Series. PwC’s purpose is to build trust and solve important problems, and their global strategy - The New Equation - is bringing this to life for their clients, people and society. By combining technology with human ingenuity, passion and experience, PwC works with organisations to deliver more intelligent, sustained outcomes.

About: 
The High Performance Podcast offers an intimate glimpse into the lives of high-achieving, successful individuals. It doesn’t matter where our guest has excelled - in sport, music, business or entertainment – they all have first-hand experiences and lessons to share. Find out what non-negotiable behaviours they employed to get them to the top, and keep them there.
 
Hosting every conversation is sports broadcaster Jake Humphrey and leading organisational psychologist Professor Damian Hughes. Jake is currently BT Sport’s Premier League anchor and former face of BBC’s Formula One coverage. Damian continues to work with leading sports organisations and teams to create a high performing culture.

Watch full unseen interviews from the podcast: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLhEga43DyktQKiqShJ75awYPgShWWAxko

For more episodes of the podcast, listen here: http://www.podfollow.com/highperformance
#highperformancepodcast #aviva #ceo #femaleceo #entrepreneurship #teamworkteambuilding #femaleentrepreneur #businesswoman #2022 #chiefexecutiveofficer

snippet.title: Harry Shearer & Dan Castellaneta Do Iconic Voices From The Simpsons | Late Night with Conan O’Brien
snippet.description:
(Original airdate: 11/20/02 ) Harry Shearer and Dan Castellaneta of “The Simpsons” showcase some of their most iconic voices from the show and share what it was like to work with The Rolling Stones.

Subscribe to watch more Conan Classic videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3nWXH_6vVJ5-xbF3bKb3Q?sub_confirmation=1
Watch more Late Night clips https://classic.teamcoco.com/

ABOUT LATE NIGHT WITH CONAN O’BRIEN
Running from 1993-2009, Late Night with Conan O’Brien is one of the most beloved late night shows in television history. Known for its absurdist humor, hilarious celebrity interviews and featuring the best stand-up comedians and musical acts of the 90’s and early 2000s. Hosted by Conan O’Brien alongside sidekick Andy Richter and house band Max Weinberg and the Max Weinberg 7, Late Night with Conan O’Brien featured unforgettable segments like “If They Mated,” “In the Year 2000,” “Desk Driving” and made a breakout star of Triumph the Insult Comic Dog.

snippet.title: the dark side of miraculous ladybug
snippet.description:
The Immaturity of Thomas Astruc Tumblr: https://immaturityofthomasastruc.tumblr.com/post/637892972340543488/the-immaturity-of-thomas-astruc-masterpost 

i mostly talk about the creator of miraculous ladybug, thomas astruc, and how he absolutely embarrasses himself on twitter. but i also dive into other more controversial and disturbing matters while having a silly goofy time along the way. 

Video Chapters:
0:00 Silly Little Intro
1:15 Jeremy Zag Wage Situation
4:20 ayyy haha (the intro to Tom) 
4:58 Tom's Twitter Rules 
6:41 Tom's Big Fat Ego
9:47 Tom is a Twitter Troll
11:14 Tom Hates Fan-Theories
11:42 Tom Hates Fan-Fiction
12:29 Tom's Silly Little Inconsistencies 
14:21 Tom's Thoughts on Politics/Religion
15:31 Racism In Miraculous
17:51 Calling Fans Sexist
20:30 Comparing Chloe to Abusers
24:15 Sexualizing Minors
26:16 Ending Thoughts

My Links: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/amanda.todhunter/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@amanda.todhunter?lang=en

snippet.title: Go vegan?  Fly less?  Or change how your pension is invested?
snippet.description:
By changing how your pension is invested can have a bigger impact on the environment than going vegan or cutting down on international travel.

Our Group CEO Amanda Blanc spoke with the Association of British Insurers about our ambition to be Net Zero by 2040. 

#ItTakesAviva

snippet.title: Inside Gwyneth Paltrow's Tranquil Family Home | Open Door | Architectural Digest
snippet.description:
Today AD is welcomed to Montecito by Gwyneth Paltrow for a tour of her peacefully luxurious family home. Paltrow first fell under the spell of Montecito during her two semesters at UC Santa Barbara and deemed it to be the perfect setting to fulfill the dream of building her first ground-up house. To tackle the assignment, Paltrow tapped her longtime collaborators Robin Standefer and Stephen Alesch of Roman and Williams, the AD100 firm that had previously designed the actress’s Tribeca loft. She eventually called upon AD100 designer Brigette Romanek, a close friend of more than two decades, to join the adventure as well. “A home should reflect the physicality and ethos of its owner, and this house takes its cues from Gwyneth’s height, beauty, and focus on distillation" says Standefer. “The house is built around extremely precise, thoughtful spaces that we refined again and again for years.”

See more of Gwyneth's home here: https://www.architecturaldigest.com/story/step-inside-gwyneth-paltrows-tranquil-montecito-home

Shop Gwyneth’s home style!

Greet visitors the Gwyneth way! Create a serene entryway with natural accents and monochromatic minimalism.
(Similar) Sphere Light Grey Planter: https://fave.co/3GhgWKn
(Similar) Beautiful Set of Weathered Round Wooden Stools: https://fave.co/349iDg3
(Similar) AllModern Tynan Dining Table: https://fave.co/3s13UvC
(Similar) Lulu and Georgia Charlynn Wood Vases (Set of 3): https://fave.co/32OZcbP
(Similar) Pottery Barn Faux Green Petal Leaf Branch: https://fave.co/3rrSjqx
(Similar) Pottery Barn Faux Potted Green Leaf Tree: https://fave.co/3HmDn2b

A modern dining room with contemporary decor is the perfect setting for hosting any and all occasions. Take a cue from GP—start with an interesting-looking light fixture and a grand dining table.
(Similar) Interstellar XL Chandelier Design: https://fave.co/3Gl2bXc
(Similar) West Elm Pure White Ceramic Vases: https://fave.co/3ocZJfe
(Similar) Annie Selke Wrought Iron Candle Holder: https://fave.co/3ofUpaI
(Similar) Crate & Barrel Cali White Pine Dining Table: https://fave.co/3riSzb7
(Similar) Modway Plastic Frame Fabric Upholstered Dining Side Chair: https://fave.co/341mqfz
(Similar) Village Wall Mural Removable or Regular Wallpaper: https://fave.co/3ocsRDa

Want to achieve the same look as Gwyneth’s show-stopping kitchen? It’s all in the details—like the actress’ favorite Staub cookware and beautiful printed porcelain plates.
Staub 6-Qt. Metallic Blue Wide Round Cocotte with Rabbit Knob: https://fave.co/34qclbE
Staub Matte Black 2-Piece Oval Baker Set: https://fave.co/3HovPvW
(Similar) Pottery Barn Puebla Stoneware 16-Piece Dinnerware Set: https://fave.co/341pFUh
(Similar) Contemporary Telescopic Vertically Stored Sliding Ladder: https://fave.co/3ITKzTR
(Similar) Bochionyu Salt and Pepper Grinder Set: https://amzn.to/3ILPJkS
(Similar) Amazon Basics Admiral 16-Piece Old Fashioned and Coolers Glass Drinkware Set: https://amzn.to/3riu3Hb
(Similar) Farmhouse Pottery Handcrafted Wooden Bowls: https://fave.co/3L4UgRd
(Similar) Pottery Barn Classic Hardware Knob, Brass: https://fave.co/3s8HfNZ
Tarts By Frederic Anton and Christelle Brua: https://amzn.to/3ghqHxD

Take another design note from Gwyneth and make your living room a cozy spot that’s still modern thanks to lots of clean lines and sleek adornments.
(Similar) Birch Lane Willem Single Globe Hand Blown Glass Pendant: https://fave.co/3scLfx7
(Similar) Pottery Barn Glass Globe Pole Pendant with Brass Hardware: https://fave.co/3L4vmBa
(Similar) Homary Modern White Lamb Wool Accent Chair Lounge: https://fave.co/34obFUc
(Similar) AllModern Hatten End Table: https://fave.co/3rgFmzE
(Similar) Jonathan Adler Campbell Floor Lamp: https://fave.co/3gfNLgn
(Similar) CB2 Zion Ivory Handwoven Rug: https://fave.co/3uxUz1p

When you buy something through our retail links, we earn an affiliate commission.

Gwyneth's hanging sculpture is courtesy of D'lisa Creager Sculpture

Want even more AD? Subscribe to the magazine and get a free tote ►► http://bit.ly/2H7oOSG
Still haven’t subscribed to Architectural Digest on YouTube? ►► http://bit.ly/2zl7s34

ABOUT ARCHITECTURAL DIGEST
The leading international design authority, Architectural Digest features articles and videos of the best in architecture, style, culture, travel, and shopping.

snippet.title: How do insurance CEOs view the industry's role in climate transition?
snippet.description:
#ClimateSolutions, the theme at #COP27 today, are top of mind for Geneva Association members – the CEOs of the biggest insurance companies in the world.
Get a unique glimpse at what they say, off- and on-the-record, in this short video (2:30 min) featuring Joachim Wenning, Munich Re; Christian Mumenthaler, SwissRe; Amanda Blanc, Aviva; Tsuyoshi Nagano, Tokio Marine; and Charles Brindamour, Intact Financial Corporation.

snippet.title: 'Nothing comes easy' - A jaded Daniel Craig 😂
snippet.description:
Sean sat down to chat to 007 himself, Daniel Craig and Academy Award-nominated film-maker Rian Johnson. They talk all things Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery, the pressure of making a sequel to an academy award nominated film, Benoit Blanc's outfits and that accent! 

#knivesout #danielcraig #glassonion #rianjohnson #edwardnorton #janellemonae

snippet.title: MARCOS CASTRO, STUDART, NAICE, AMANDA, FÁBIO NUNES E AARHON PINHEIRO - ParaCast #7 | PARAFERNALHA
snippet.description:
Virou bagunça: junte no mesmo programa participantes do UTC, um improvisador e animador de plateia do Multishow e o elenco da Parafernalha e veja o resultado! No último Paracast de 2022 uma resenha onde comediantes se reúnem para falar aleatoriedades. Será que ao fim dessa conversa é possível chegar a alguma conclusão?
 
#parafernalha #paracast #videocast 

---
FICHA TÉCNICA:
Idealização: Thais Belchior 
Roteiro: Jaiê
Apresentação: Thais Belchior 
Convidados: Marcos Castro, Rafael Studart, Aarhon Pinheiro, Fabio Nunes, Naice e Amanda Orestes. 
Direção: Bruno Laet
Direção Geral ParaCast: Jaiê
Produção: Joana D'Aguiar e André Mello
Arte/Figurino: Pedro Blanc 
Captação: AGR Podcast Estúdios
Edição: Marco Hartmann
Logger: Bruno Barcellos 
Direção Geral: Marina Croce
Direção de Conteúdo: Jaiê  
Coordenador de Produto: Jonas Mourilhe
Analista de Projetos Especiais: Guilherme Resende
Redes Sociais: Carlos Henrique Trancoso e Didi Mariz. 
Realização: Webedia Studios  
Direção Geral: Rodrigo Siqueira Ribeiro 
Coordenação de PMO: Alessandra Santos
Coordenação de Direção: Fernando Leal
Coordenação de Arte: Caroline Viana 
Coordenação de Pós-produção: Jorge Barreto
